### Post by blitzkrieger on 2007-11-14
Let me know if any other information might be helpful.

Wireless works just find with the supplied generic kernel.

The module for that kernel is located at:

/lib/modules/2.6.22-14-generic/ubuntu/wireless/prism2_usb/prism2_usb.ko

source code I am trying to compile for the new kernel is located: 

/usr/src/modules/linux-wlan-ng/src/prism2/driver/prism2_usb.c

but as much as I try to compile it will not make the module?!?!

What am I doing wrong?
